primaryServiceHook: Coffee Club membership — $15/month, 50% off all drinks every day
anythingSpecial: Two locations: main café at 3810 Atascocita Rd (Mon–Fri 5AM–12PM) and Fall Creek Farmers Market at 7930 Fall Creek Bend Dr (weekends and events, 9AM–1PM, check social for market dates). Partner roaster: The Hermit Cafe, Houston.

nap.address2: 7930 Fall Creek Bend Dr, Humble TX 77396 (Fall Creek Farmers Market)
